content.text: {"component":"discovering","summary":"Discovering presents as a Symfony 7.x discovery/retrieval subsystem with clear identity, structured architecture manifests, multi-surface runtime, and seeded QA/ops tooling; it remains pre-RC but materially organized for portfolio integration.","strengths":["Clear product identity and scope captured in PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md and README.md","Structured Symfony 7.x architecture with manifests and typed layers (Dto/Service/Controller)","Multi-surface runtime (console, web UI) with preflight checks","Multiple test suites scaffolded (Unit, Functional, Contract, Behavioral)","Seeded QA/security tooling (qa_guard, docblock policy, security/runtime preflight)","Active documentation/report posture (Antora docs, installability/status reports)"],"risks":["CI execution depth not evidenced; presence of .github/workflows without visible pipeline guarantees","phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon only as *.dist; local policy/config materialization may lag","Limited explicit observability/deployment automation evidence","PHP 8.4+ requirement may constrain deployment targets if environments trail"],"next_actions":["Promote phpunit.xml.dist and phpstan.neon.dist to enforced configs in CI","Wire a GitHub Actions workflow to run composer ci (preflights, lint, tests) on PRs/main","Run OpenAPI dump scripts in CI and publish artifacts to docs/report","Document/verify runtime observability and deployment automation in repo (metrics/logging steps)","Gate runtime/security preflight scripts in CI to fail on violations","Add a status badge linking to CI runs in README.md"],"notes":["Assessment grounded in repository tree and manifests at commit 234fc92 on branch master","Report excerpts sourced from in-repo Antora report and recent status/installability reports","Repository facts captured identity is explicit and coherent as an internal discovery/retrieval component, supported by in-repo product and boundary manifests and Symfony-native framing.","risks":["Public positioning remains internal platform-first rather than hardened external product","Assessment should continue to be refreshed by scheduled scans to capture drift"],"improvements":["Keep PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md aligned with surface capabilities and API dumps","Expose CI status and published docs links in README.md"],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md","BOUNDING_MANIFEST.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/discovering/report/index.adoc"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Architecture structure not fully evidenced","Technical debt and refactoring cadence not yet observable via CI signals"],"improvements":["Expand ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md with context boundaries and dependencies","Add architectural checks (e.g., layer rules) to qa_guard and run in PHPUnit scaffolding and QA guard tooling are present, with policy and static analysis configs supplied as *.dist awaiting CI enforcement.","risks":["CI execution of tests and analysis is not evidenced","phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon not materialized may cause local drift"],"improvements":["Promote phpunit.xml.dist and phpstan.neon.dist to active configs and commit local overrides","Run composer ci in GitHub Actions on push/PR and publish coverage/artifacts"],"evidence":["tests/Unit","tests/Functional","tests/Contract","tests/Behavioral","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon.dist","tools/qa_guard.php","tools/docblock_policy_check.php","composer.json"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational posture shows early strength via preflight/security scripts and documentation/report surfaces, though explicit observability and deployment automation are light.","risks":["Observability (metrics/tracing/logging) and alerting hooks not shown","Delivery automation specifics in .github/workflows are not visible"],"improvements":["Add CI workflows to run preflights, lint, tests, and publish docs","Document/logging and metrics strategy; add health endpoints where applicable"],"evidence":["tools/security_preflight.php","tools/runtime_preflight.php",".github/workflows","report/discovering-status-2026-04-03.md","docs/antora.yml"]},"market":{"summary":"Positioning aligns with enterprise discovery/retrieval classes, expressed as a Symfony-native internal platform capability.","risks":["Proprietary license and internal focus may limit external product evidenced","Config *.dist reliance may hide local divergence until CI is in place"],"improvements":["Stand up CI to run composer ci and publish docs","Promote *.dist configs, enforce preflights, and documentation"],"evidence":["report/discovering-installability-proof-2026-04-03.md","report/discovering-status-2026-04-03.md",".github/workflows","tools/runtime_preflight.php","tools/security_preflight.php"]}}}
